'''âch-f-d''' ('''kachafad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pultrude|pultrude]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pultrude|pultrude]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-f-d
|-
! Lemma
| kachafad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichafad|thichafad]] || [[word:jichafad|jichafad]] || [[word:shichafad|shichafad]] || [[word:kichafad|kichafad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchafad|thuthuchafad]] || [[word:jujuchafad|jujuchafad]] || [[word:shushuchafad|shushuchafad]] || [[word:kukuchafad|kukuchafad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchafad|thuchafad]] || [[word:juchafad|juchafad]] || [[word:shuchafad|shuchafad]] || [[word:kuchafad|kuchafad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchafad|thuchafad]] || [[word:juchafad|juchafad]] || [[word:shuchafad|shuchafad]] || [[word:kuchafad|kuchafad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechafad|thechafad]] || [[word:jechafad|jechafad]] || [[word:shechafad|shechafad]] || [[word:kechafad|kechafad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochafad|thothochafad]] || [[word:jojochafad|jojochafad]] || [[word:shoshochafad|shoshochafad]] || [[word:kokochafad|kokochafad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochafad|thochafad]] || [[word:jochafad|jochafad]] || [[word:shochafad|shochafad]] || [[word:kochafad|kochafad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochafad|thochafad]] || [[word:jochafad|jochafad]] || [[word:shochafad|shochafad]] || [[word:kochafad|kochafad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchafad|thĂŠchafad]] || [[word:jĂŠchafad|jĂŠchafad]] || [[word:shĂŠchafad|shĂŠchafad]] || [[word:kĂŠchafad|kĂŠchafad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachafad|thathachafad]] || [[word:jajachafad|jajachafad]] || [[word:shashachafad|shashachafad]] || [[word:kakachafad|kakachafad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachafad|thachafad]] || [[word:jachafad|jachafad]] || [[word:shachafad|shachafad]] || [[word:kachafad|kachafad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachafad|thachafad]] || [[word:jachafad|jachafad]] || [[word:shachafad|shachafad]] || [[word:kachafad|kachafad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachafad|shachafad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachafad|goshachafad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachafad|gokishachafad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachafadnĂŒ|shachafadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachafadnknĂŒ|goshachafadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafadnĂŒ|gokishachafadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachafadshĂ«|shachafadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachafadnkshĂ«|goshachafadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachafadshĂ«|gokishachafadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafadro|shachafadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafadnkro|goshachafadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafadro|gokishachafadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafadmu|shachafadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafadnkmu|goshachafadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafadmu|gokishachafadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachafadsher|shachafadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachafadnksher|goshachafadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachafadsher|gokishachafadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachafadng|shachafadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachafadnkng|goshachafadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachafadng|gokishachafadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachafadya|shachafadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachafadnkya|goshachafadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachafadya|gokishachafadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachafadyam|shachafadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachafadnkyam|goshachafadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachafadyam|gokishachafadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafadnĂŒshĂ«|shachafadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshachafadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishachafadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafadnĂŒro|shachafadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafadnknĂŒro|goshachafadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafadnĂŒro|gokishachafadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafadnĂŒmu|shachafadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafadnknĂŒmu|goshachafadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafadnĂŒmu|gokishachafadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafadshĂ«nĂŒ|shachafadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshachafadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishachafadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafadshĂ«ro|shachafadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafadnkshĂ«ro|goshachafadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafadshĂ«ro|gokishachafadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafadshĂ«mu|shachafadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafadnkshĂ«mu|goshachafadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafadshĂ«mu|gokishachafadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafadronĂŒ|shachafadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafadnkronĂŒ|goshachafadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafadronĂŒ|gokishachafadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafadroshĂ«|shachafadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafadnkroshĂ«|goshachafadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafadroshĂ«|gokishachafadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafadromu|shachafadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafadnkromu|goshachafadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafadromu|gokishachafadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafadmunĂŒ|shachafadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafadnkmunĂŒ|goshachafadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafadmunĂŒ|gokishachafadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafadmushĂ«|shachafadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafadnkmushĂ«|goshachafadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafadmushĂ«|gokishachafadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafadmuro|shachafadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafadnkmuro|goshachafadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafadmuro|gokishachafadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
